'''SimpleX Modding team''' (active in 2004 - 2005) was a team formed by [[HocusPocus]] in June 2004 to work on various LieroX Mods and packs.

== Members ==
=== Leader ===
* [[HocusPocus]] - (gfx, sfx, scripting, levels, skins)

=== Normal members ===
* Andy Tran - (gfx, skins)
* [[Blackninja]] - (gfx, scripting, levels)
* Colonel Darktale - (gfx, sfx, scripting)
* Kossu Man - (scripting)
* MasterOfHyrule - (sfx, levels)
* Mauganra99 - (sfx, scripting)
* NobodyX - (gfx, scripting)
* Rad Tad - (gfx, sfx, scripting)
* the new gd - (gfx, sfx, scripting)
* TTFTCUTS - (gfx, scripting)
* Tuplanolla - (gfx, sfx, scripting)

== Projects ==
=== LieroX-Mas ===
LieroX-Mas Mod is a Mod with 34 Christmas related weapons. SimpleX Modding team also made Christmas theme Levels, Skins and Frontend which were released in [[Liero Xtreme v0.56 Christmas Edition]].

=== Unfinished ===
As a 2nd project SimpleX Modding team was planning to create LieroX Mod, a mod that would be a representative of the LX scripting capabilities. It was never finished or released. Same happened with their 3rd project - Anime Mod.

== External links ==
* [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=18568 SimpleX Modding team GU thread]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721170035/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/SimpleX_Modding_team -->
